ring_color.Description: Color of the ring displayed during the experiment.

ring_radius.Description: Refers to the radius of the ring. During the experiment the ring either has a constant radius or it degenerates from a ring with a larger to a smaller radius.

Levels.1.5d: A ring with 1.5 degrees visual angle radius.
Levels.3d: A ring with 3 degrees visual angle radius.
Levels.3.5d-1.5d: A ring that degenerates from a radius of 3.5 to 1.5 degrees visual angle.
Levels.7d-3.5d: A ring that degenerates from a radius of 7 to 3.5 degrees visual angle.
Levels.10d-7d: A ring that degenerates from a radius of 10 to 7 degrees visual angle.
